Facebook page exists (facebook.com/p/Innerstellar-Overdrive-61553786158399/) but page body is blank with no music links. duluthhomegrown.org/bands/innerstellar-overdrive/ confirmed members and bio but provides zero external links. Checked YouTube, Bandcamp, SoundCloud, Spotify, Apple Music, TikTok, Reddit, Linktree, Tidal, Deezer, Amazon Music, Discogs, Eventbrite, Instagram — no recorded music found on any platform. Note: correct spelling is 'Innerstellar' not 'Interstellar'; multiple unrelated Interstellar Overdrive bands on Bandcamp/SoundCloud are Pink Floyd cover acts and not this band.

acts.name: Wes Hadrich

youtube_video.note: search exhausted across all known platforms (2026-04-15 final pass): alt-country storyteller in Duluth scene since ~2007; recorded 4 albums 2007-2014 including 'Naturally Blue' (2014, with Greg Tiburzi, Steve Isakson, Mike Randoph, recorded at Sparta Sounds by Rich Mattson); performs 'gritty heartfelt Americana-esque' songs influenced by Springsteen, Gram Parsons, Jayhawks, Dwight Yoakam; reviewed in Duluth Reader (duluthreader.com/articles/2014/10/16/103785, Oct 2014) but no streaming links in review; duluthhomegrown.org/bands/wes-hadrich/ confirmed bio and album details but provides zero external links. Checked YouTube ('Rich Mattson Wes Hadrich' search: no results), Bandcamp, SoundCloud, Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music (no hit), CDBaby, Discogs, TikTok, Reddit, Linktree, Tidal, Deezer, Eventbrite, Facebook, Instagram — no recorded music found on any platform. Albums appear to be physical/CD-only releases with no digital distribution.

acts.description: A singer-songwriter performing gritty, heartfelt Americana-esque songs influenced by Bruce Springsteen, Gram Parsons, the Jayhawks, and Dwight Yoakam.

acts.name: Wetland Willows

youtube_video.note: search exhausted across all known platforms (2026-04-15 final pass): wife-and-husband duo Brooke (née Chaffee) and Caleb Anderson from Duluth; 'fun Americana sound with gospel undertones and New Orleans influences'; performed at Bent Paddle Brewing (Aug 2025, opening for Saltydog), Wussow's Concert Cafe, Dovetail Cafe for Homegrown 2026. Instagram account @wetlandwillows confirmed to exist but bio/links not accessible via fetch. duluthhomegrown.org/bands/wetland-willows/ confirmed duo identity and bio but provides zero external links. visitduluth.com event listing (saltydog-with-wetland-willows) has no music links. SoundCloud account soundcloud.com/caleb-anderson-44 exists but returned error page — unconfirmed identity. Checked YouTube, Bandcamp, SoundCloud, Spotify, Apple Music, TikTok, Reddit, Linktree, Tidal, Deezer, Amazon Music, Discogs, Eventbrite, Facebook, gottabesuperior.com — no recorded music found on any platform.
